title: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 Releases Special Episode 4 Ending Video
content: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 has revealed the special ending movie video from Episode 4 (Episode 16 overall), which was released today . Crunchyroll is streaming the anime worldwide.
author: Anime Corner

title: Witch Hat Atelier Tops Spring 2026 Ranking for the First Time in Week 4
content: Witch Hat Atelier managed to win the Spring 2026 ranking for the first time Week 4, breaking Re:ZERO Season 4’s three-week streak . Studio BUG FILMS ( Zom 100: Bucket List of the Dead ) is in charge of the animation, with Crunchyroll streaming the anime globally.
author: Anime Corner

title: Crunchyroll Adds Galaxy Kickoff!! Soccer TV Anime
content: Crunchyroll began streaming all 39 episodes of the 2012 Galaxy Kickoff!! ( Ginga e Kickoff!! ) anime with Japanese audio and English subtitles on Friday. Crunchyroll describes the anime: When a soccer club breaks up due to a lack of players, one boy aims to start a new team, inspired by a girl who plays…
author: ANN

title: HIDIVE to Stream English Dubs for Petals of Reincarnation, The Most Heretical Last Boss Queen Season 2, 2 More Titles
content: HIDIVE announced on Friday it will release English dubs for the the television anime of Petals of Reincarnation , the second season of The Most Heretical Last Boss Queen: From Villainess to Savior , the anime of Kirio Fan Club , and the television anime of Yowayowa Sensei .
author: ANN

title: Tezuka: God of Manga Documentary Film Streams Trailer
content: The Tezuka Productions YouTube channel began streaming on Friday the first trailer for the upcoming feature-length documentary on Osamu Tezuka titled Tezuka: God of Manga . The documentary project will have a Kickstarter crowdfunding campaign that will begin on an as of yet unspecified date.
author: ANN

title: Tezuka: God of Manga Documentary Film Streams Trailer
content: The Tezuka Productions YouTube channel began streaming on Friday the first trailer for the upcoming feature-length documentary on Osamu Tezuka titled Tezuka: God of Manga . title: Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes Fighting Game's DLC Character Zohar The 'Doppelganger' Debuts in Summer 2026
content: Arc System Works America announced on Friday it will release the new DLC character Zohar The "Doppelganger" for Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes , the newest installment in French Bread's original Under Night In-Birth 2D fighting game series, in summer 2026. The company revealed images of the character.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Sequel’s Latest Anime Unveils a Heartbreaking Detail
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo manga! The sequel manga by Gege Akutami, Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo , shocked fans with the unexpected fate of Yuji Itadori.
author: ComicBook

title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls Game's Trailer Introduces Fighting Avengers
content: Sony Interactive Entertainment began streaming a new trailer on Sunday for PlayStation Studios , Arc System Works , and Marvel Games' Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls 4v4 tag team fighter game . The trailer highlights the Fighting Avengers team, featuring Captain America, Iron Man, Hulk, and Black Panther.
author: ANN

title: 12 Years Later, Major Isekai Anime Confirms Disappointing Streaming Update Without Ever Getting a Sequel
content: With the anime industry growing in massive popularity across the globe, it wouldn’t be an exaggeration to say it’s already one of the mainstream forms of media. No doubt, Crunchyroll is the largest streaming hub for anime fans across the globe, adding dozens of new series every quarter as part of the new season…
author: ComicBook
